testcase.name: test_post_checkin_saves_userid

failure.message: AssertionError: userId missing from checkin response: {'week': 9999, 'date': '2099-01-01', 'avgPain': 0.0, 'avgRPE': 7.0, 'completionRate': 1.0, 'avgBodyweight': 100.0, 'avgCalories': None, 'avgProtein': None, 'avgCarbs': None, 'avgFat': None, 'personalNotes': 'TEST_checkin_userid_sync', 'recommendations': [], 'createdAt': '2026-04-14T17:36:26.421000', 'id': '69de7b1af5c80463d8704718'} assert 'userId' in {'avgBodyweight': 100.0, 'avgCalories': None, 'avgCarbs': None, 'avgFat': None, ...}

testcase.name: test_post_substitution_saves_userid

failure.message: AssertionError: userId missing from substitution response: {'date': '2099-01-01', 'week': 9999, 'day': 'Day 1', 'sessionType': 'Strength', 'originalExercise': 'TEST_deadlift', 'replacementExercise': 'TEST_trap_bar_deadlift', 'reason': 'test userId sync', 'timestamp': '2026-04-14T17:36:27.292000', 'id': '69de7b1bf5c80463d8704719'} assert 'userId' in {'date': '2099-01-01', 'day': 'Day 1', 'id': '69de7b1bf5c80463d8704719', 'originalExercise': 'TEST_deadlift', ...}
